body.title: Add owns/delegates_to contract fields to architecture intention-points
body.description:
**Problem:** The architecture intention-points (devlab/runtime/memory/architecture/*.json) carry `implementing_files` but no declaration of what each device is *allowed* to do. So "does capability X belong in device Y?" is re-judged from scratch each session, sometimes wrong — e.g. inference_gateway.py living inside igor/cognition/ and making direct urllib/OPENROUTER provider calls went unnoticed because nothing declared inference is NOT igor's to own.
**Proposed shape:** Extend the architecture intention-point schema with two fields: `owns` (list of capability strings this device holds) and `delegates_to` (map of capability → owning device). Populate both for every existing intention-point (~15 devices). Anchor igor on [[feedback_igor_uses_not_contains]]: owns = {graph-tree cognition, TWM, emotional milieu, emotional memories, dreaming, NE impulses}; delegates_to = {inference: inference, comms: bus, mcp: skeleton, storage: postgres, dispatch: granny}. Keep the capability vocabulary consistent across devices (one term per capability — [[feedback_homogeneity_over_special_case]]).
**Affected files:** devlab/runtime/memory/architecture/*.json (all ~15, re-emit via memory_emit reusing each file's stamp for atomic overwrite); document the two new fields in the intention-point shape.
**Design rules:** canonical-memory-home (intention-points stay in devlab/runtime/memory/architecture/); homogeneity-over-special-case (one schema, all devices); theory-of-operation (each owns/delegates entry carries its why where non-obvious).
**Scope boundary:** IN — add + populate owns/delegates_to on every architecture intention-point. OUT — the audit enforcement (T-contract-violation-audit-check); the actual inference extraction (T-igor-inference-gateway-bypasses-proxy, the first consumer).
**Test plan:** (1) grep architecture/*.json → every device JSON has non-empty `owns` AND `delegates_to`. (2) igor's intention-point: `inference` is absent from owns and present in delegates_to (→ inference device). (3) capability terms are consistent — no two JSONs use different words for the same capability.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: owns/delegates_to contract added to all 15 architecture intention-points; consistent capability vocabulary enforced by tests/contract/test_device_contract_maps.py (6 tests); floor tier (device-shim, memory-dev-artifacts) declares empty delegates_to by design. Proof: red=AssertionError green=passed @ 99e3ec3f.
